R ^ . 3270 ( ^ ) % ^ 4 f ^ ^ , 2 0 1 5 ^ ^ r % ^ W 255 GI/2016 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 T H E G A Z E T T E O F I N D I A : E X T R A O R D I N A R Y [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF COMMERCE AND INDUSTRY NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 18th January, 2016 G.S.R. 79(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (3) of section 4 of the Marine Products Export Development Authority Act, 1972 (13 of 1972), read with rules 3 and 4 of the Marine Products Export Development Authority Rules, 1972, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the notification of the Government of India, Ministry of Commerce and Industry, Department of Commerce, published vide S.O. No. 3270 (E), dated 3rd December, 2015 namely:- In the said notification, for serial number (3 and 4) and entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted, namely:- “3. Dr. Kambhampati Hari Babu, - Member Member of Parliament, Lok Sabha 4. Shri Kalikesh Narayan Singh Deo, - Member” Member of Parliament, Lok Sabha [F. No. 1/9/2009 – EP (MP) – Vol.II] SANTOSH KUMAR SARANGI, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub section (ii) dated the 4th December, 2015 vide G.S.R. 3270(E) dated 3rd December, 2015. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
